name: @stellar-nft-marketplace/contracts
description: Soroban smart contracts for Stellar NFT marketplace

scripts.deploy:nft: soroban contract invoke --id $NFT_CONTRACT_ID --source-account testnet --network testnet -- initialize --admin $ADMIN_ADDRESS
scripts.deploy:marketplace: soroban contract invoke --id $MARKETPLACE_CONTRACT_ID --source-account testnet --network testnet -- initialize --admin $ADMIN_ADDRESS
